TAGLINE: Master the Art of Filipino Flavor — where art, music, and cuisine come together in perfect harmony.
ABOUT_TEXT: Once a beloved music-themed hangout (Music Wizard Cafe), Maestro Café is the same soul in a new key. We've traded the wizard hat for the conductor's baton — still playing the music of art, culture, and Filipino flavor. Every dish is a composition, every coffee a concerto. From Spanish Lattes to sizzling sisig, we serve Filipino and American comfort food in a space that hums with warmth and creativity.
MENU_ITEM_1_DESC: ⭐ Must-try — rich espresso with steamed milk and Spanish-style sweetness
MENU_ITEM_3_DESC: ⭐ Classic or Spicy — signature chicken dish
MENU_ITEM_4_DESC: ⭐ Signature sizzling sisig — a crowd favorite
TESTIMONIAL_1_QUOTE: "It has a cozy vibe. Loving the drinks, especially their mocha. They have a variety of pastas to choose from."
TESTIMONIAL_2_QUOTE: "The vibe and the service is very friendly."
TESTIMONIAL_3_QUOTE: "Masarap at mura (Delicious and cheap) — the food is great for the price."
ADDRESS: CPV Business Center, Manila East Road cor. Col Guido Street, Barangay San Roque, Angono, Rizal
SEO_TITLE: Maestro Café | Filipino Restaurant & Coffee in Angono, Rizal
SEO_DESCRIPTION: Maestro Café — Master the Art of Filipino Flavor. Filipino and American comfort food, specialty coffee, and refreshing beverages in Angono, Rizal.
SEO_KEYWORDS: maestro cafe, angono, rizal, filipino food, coffee, cafe, restaurant angono, filipino cuisine
